title: rubus × pseudocontractifolius
intro: Rubus × pseudocontractifolius, also known as the hybrid blackberry or pseudocontractile blackberry, is a species of hybrid blackberry that combines the characteristics of the European and American blackberries. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanins and tannins, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudocontractifolius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially inhibiting the growth of certain cancer cells. The plant is typically used to prepare teas, infusions, and jams, with herbal preparations often involving the use of the berries, leaves, and roots.
